name: Guest navigation shows only public links

planSteps.description: Navigate to the homepage (/) as a guest without logging in
Verify the header navigation shows 'Home', 'How it works' and 'Features'
Verify the 'Log in' and 'Sign up' buttons are visible in the header
Verify there is NO 'Tournaments' link and NO '⚔️ Tournaments' button in the header
Verify there is NO 'Profile' link or user account menu in the header
